title: Count-up Widget
excerpt: I am looking to have a count-up past a given day in a widget on my dashboard. Ex: xDay x hours x min, since launch of a product. Has any one found a way to accomplish this?

posts.author: bssmaster8 (Ben Walt)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to have a count-up past a given day in a widget on my dashboard. Ex: xDay x hours x min, since launch of a product. Has any one found a way to accomplish this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Is that product a line item on the dashboard you’re pulling from? If so, you could add a formula column that is the number of days since creation. Then on the widget you could filter so only that column/shows referencing that item.

posts.author: MaryJan (Mary Jennings)
posts.cookedHtml:
To achieve a count-up widget on your dashboard, you can use Monday’s Formula Column to calculate the difference between the current time and your launch date. Unfortunately, there isn’t a direct built-in widget for this, but you can create a custom formula, like:

DATEDIF({Launch Date}, TODAY(), "y") & " years, " & DATEDIF({Launch Date}, TODAY(), "ym") & " months, " & DATEDIF({Launch Date}, TODAY(), "md") & " days"

This will show the years, months, and days since your launch. For more precise counting (e.g., down to hours and minutes), you could add more logic to the formula or use Monday’s API to track real-time data.

posts.author: bssmaster8 (Ben Walt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Mary, I tried this and it was not recognized my Monday. I did some research and looks like Monday doesn’t recognize the DATEDIF function.
